title: GSR 180(E) Regarding extension of tenure of Shri Justice Rajendra Menon, Commissioner

L.-33004/99 vlk/kj.k EXTRAORDINARY Hkkx II—[k.M 3—mi&[k.M (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) izkf/dkj ls izdkf'kr PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY la- 134] ubZ fnYyh] c`gLifrokj] ekpZ 12] 2015@iQkYxqu 21] 1936 No. 134] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, MARCH 12, 2015/PHALGUNA 21, 1936 jlk;u ,oa moZjd ea=ky; ¼jlk;u rFkk isVªksjlk;u foHkkx½ vf/klwpuk ubZ fnYyh] 12 माच榁] 2015 lk lk lk lk----dk dk dk dk----fu fu fu fu---- 180 180 180 180¼v½ ¼v½ ¼v½ ¼v½.—भोपाल गैस 琇रसाव 灴ासदी (दाव犘 का िन瀡तारण) अिधिनयम, 1985 (1985 का 21) क琉 धारा 6 क琉 उप-धारा (1) म犆 灹द牵 शि猴य犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, क犆灶 सरकार, एत獵ारा, म瀇य 灹देश उ獀 瀈यायालय के पीठासीन उ獀 瀈यायाधीश 炈ी 瀈यायमू琔त राजे瀈灶 मेनन क琉 भोपाल गैस 琇रसाव 灴ासदी पीिड़त犘 के क瀖याण के िलए आयु猴 के पद के समवत牸 灹भार क琉 अविध को 25.11.2014 से एक वष榁 क琉 अविध तक के िलए या अगले आदेश犘 तक, जो भी पहले हो, बढ़ाती है । [फा. सं. 21/21/2002 - भोपाल सेल] डॉ. ए.जे.वी. 灹साद, संयु猴 सिचव MINISTRY OF CHEMICALS AND FERTILIZERS (Department of Chemicals and Petrochemicals) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 12th March, 2015 G.S.R. 180(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 6 of the Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster (Processing of Claims) Act, 1985 (21 of 1985), the Central Government hereby extends the tenure of Shri Justice Rajendra Menon, a sitting Judge of the High Court of Madhya Pradesh to hold concurrent charge of the post of Commissioner for the Welfare of the Victims of Bhopal Gas Leak Disaster, for a period of one year with effect from 25.11.2014 or until further orders, whichever is earlier. [F. No. 21/21/2002-B.Cell] Dr. A.J.V. PRASAD, Jt. Secy. 1164 GI/2015 Printed by the Manager, Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 1 --
